# Castle.ai — Full Content Index

## What is Castle.ai?
Castle.ai is an AI chess assistant that analyzes chess positions using a state-of-the-art neural network engine. Unlike traditional engines that only show centipawn evaluations, Castle.ai explains the *why* behind every move recommendation in plain English.

## Who is it for?
Castle.ai is designed for chess players rated 800–2000 Elo who want to improve faster than traditional study methods allow.
